title: Pic-Machina Image Sidecar
description: Per-image metadata sidecar file written alongside the source image (e.g. photo.jpg → photo.jpg.json). Contains user annotations, EXIF mirror, reverse-geocoded location, AI-computed fields, and a processing log.

$version.description: Schema version. Always 1 for the current format.

source.description: Immutable identity fields written on first save and never overwritten.

filename.description: Original filename of the image this sidecar belongs to.

sizeBytes.description: File size of the image in bytes at the time the sidecar was first created.

exif.description: Mirror of embedded EXIF fields extracted from the image. Read-only — populated automatically by Pic-Machina and not intended to be hand-authored.

focalLength.description: Focal length as a human-readable string, e.g. '24mm'.

aperture.description: Aperture as a human-readable string, e.g. 'f/1.8'.

shutterSpeed.description: Shutter speed as a human-readable string, e.g. '1/250'.

dateTaken.description: Date and time the photo was taken, in ISO 8601 format.

gpsLat.description: GPS latitude in decimal degrees. Positive = North.

gpsLng.description: GPS longitude in decimal degrees. Positive = East.

geo.description: Human-readable location derived from GPS coordinates via reverse-geocoding (Nominatim / OpenStreetMap). User-editable.

annotation.description: User-authored curation data. The primary fields a human edits in the Pic-Machina metadata panel.

rating.description: Star rating from 1 (lowest) to 5 (highest). Null means unrated.

flag.description: Curation flag. 'pick' marks an image for selection; 'reject' marks it for discard; null means unflagged.

tags.description: Free-form keyword tags for search and grouping.

caption.description: Free-text caption or description of the image.

computed.description: Fields written automatically by Pic-Machina batch transforms (AI analysis, sharpness scoring, OCR, etc.). External systems may add their own fields here. Unknown fields are preserved.

sharpnessScore.description: Perceptual sharpness score from 0.0 (very blurry) to 1.0 (very sharp), computed by the sharpness-detect transform.

blurLabel.description: Human-readable blur classification derived from sharpnessScore.

ocrText.description: Full text extracted from the image by an OCR transform.

ocrTags.description: Comma-separated keywords extracted from OCR output.

faceCount.description: Number of faces detected in the image (stored as a string for template-variable compatibility).

personCount.description: Number of people detected in the image (stored as a string for template-variable compatibility).

poseLabel.description: Dominant pose classification detected by the people-detect transform.

peopleLabel.description: Natural-language description of the people detected, e.g. 'two people (sitting)'.

processing.description: Append-only log of every batch run that has processed this image. New entries are appended; existing entries are never modified.

recipeName.description: Human-readable name of the recipe that was applied.

at.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds since epoch) when the run completed.
